name: jukebox-infer
summary: Inference-only implementation of OpenAI Jukebox for PyTorch 2.7+

        ---
        
        This project includes code adapted from the following source:
        
        **OpenAI Jukebox** (https://github.com/openai/jukebox)
        - License: MIT
        - Copyright: 2020 OpenAI
        - Original Paper: "Jukebox: A Generative Model for Music" (https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.00341)
        - Authors: Prafulla Dhariwal, Heewoo Jun, Christine Payne, Jong Wook Kim, Alec Radford, Ilya Sutskever
        
        This inference-only implementation extracts and modernizes the inference capabilities
        from the original Jukebox project, removing all training code and dependencies for
        a lean, single-GPU inference experience compatible with PyTorch 2.7+.
author: Jukebox-Infer Contributors
